displayLabel: Suckle — your mouth works without moving

stepTexts.0: Today you learn to suckle. No bobbing — your mouth stays on the head and you suck.
stepTexts.6: Wrap your lips around the head. And suck. Gently.
stepTexts.16: Keep going. You can feel the pressure in your cheeks. That's it.
stepTexts.28: Breathe through your nose. Keep your mouth in place.
